title: Promotions - Adding and managing promotions on DISH POS
workflow_title: Promotions - Adding and managing promotions on DISH POS
source: support.dish.co official article + live form inspection

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, open Products and select Promotions, then click + Add promotion.
Enter a name for the promotion — here, "{NAME} promotion".
Under Availability, set the Location where the promotion applies.
Set the Period during which the promotion is valid.
Add a condition under Conditions and select the product {NAME}, so the discount applies to it.
Choose the promotion type: Combo deal, Ticket discount or Quantity discount.
Set the Effect - the discount amount that applies to {NAME}.
Finally, send the changes via General, the sub-category General, and Send.
